what_broke: 5 URLs (/guide/, /articles/, /consulting/, /insights/, /fueling-methodology/) 404/403'd in the global nav+footer on every page sitewide for months, unnoticed
root_cause: aspirational URLs — generators linked pages that were planned but never built
fix_applied: Removed dead links from header/footer; PRODUCTS dropdown now points at Plans+Courses; ARTICLES points at the live Substack
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() (via check_links.py) flags any dead same-site link; test_no_dead_link_targets enforces the known-good set
verified: docs/whoops-audit-jul2026.md — commit 47a4d0a; scripts/check_links.py built same night to keep it loud

what_broke: /questionnaire/ and /products/training-plans/ were stale pre-fix pages still carrying all 5 dead nav links + an unhashed A/B script
root_cause: questionnaire/training-plan pages weren't regenerated after the nav/footer fix shipped elsewhere
fix_applied: Regenerated /questionnaire/; added a 301 from /products/training-plans/ to canonical /training-plans/
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead /questionnaire/ or /coaching/ link as a RED money-path-404 (check_links.py SEED_PATHS includes /questionnaire/); check_money_path_wiring() guards the generator offline
verified: docs/whoops-audit-jul2026.md — round 2 fixes, same night as the round-1 audit

what_broke: 8 of 14 radar dimensions showed 0 on all 427 race pages
root_cause: gravel-god key names (e.g. length/elevation) were never fully remapped to the road fondo_rating dimension keys (distance/climbing/etc.) in the page generator
fix_applied: Key remap fixed in wordpress/generate_neo_brutalist.py; full regen + redeploy
regression_check: scripts/validate_profile.py (imported by immune_check.py's run_validate_profile()) flags any fondo_rating dimension that is missing or out of 1-5 range per profile

what_broke: Jul 22 immune digest reported 18 NEW findings (2 money-path-404 RED + 16 dead-link) that were all HTTP 202 SiteGround bot-challenge responses (sg-captcha header), not dead pages — all URLs confirmed 200 minutes later
root_cause: check_links.py treated any non-200 status as dead; SiteGround's WAF answers challenged bots with 202 + sg-captcha instead of the page, so a challenge window during the scan fabricated an outage
fix_applied: check_links.py now detects 202/sg-captcha as a WAF challenge, retries with 20s/45s backoff, and reports still-challenged URLs in a separate WAF-CHALLENGED block (exit 0); immune_check.py surfaces that block as a single YELLOW live-check-challenged finding instead of per-URL dead-link/money-path-404. Same fix applied to gravel-race-automation and nordic-race-automation twins.
regression_check: immune_check.py run_live_link_check() emits live-check-challenged (YELLOW/low) when check_links.py prints a WAF-CHALLENGED block; a real 404/500 still produces dead-link/money-path-404 because only 202+sg-captcha is classified as a challenge
verified: 2026-07-22 manual curl of all 18 URLs returned 200; post-fix check_links.py run: 12 seeds + 300 discovered, all alive, exit 0

what_broke: Adversarial GPT-5.6-sol review of the same-day WAF fix found 5 confirmed defects: (1) serial 65s-per-URL backoff meant the exact 18-URL incident would sleep ~1170s and blow immune_check's 900s subprocess timeout, degrading the whole scan to live-check-failed; (2) run_live_link_check ignored returncode/stderr, so a checker crash with empty stdout was a silent green; (3) the 202-OR-sg-captcha classifier would downgrade a real 404/500 carrying the header to 'challenged'; (4) a challenged-only run exited 0, making the weekly link-check workflow green while verifying nothing; (5) the challenged finding stored only a count, so baseline fingerprinting could suppress a later challenge on a different URL. Also corrects the prior entry's overstated claims ('HTTP 202 + sg-captcha' — code used OR; '404/500 always stays dead' — was false with the header).
root_cause: first-pass fix reviewed only by its author; per-URL serial backoff and count-only reporting were design errors
fix_applied: Classifier tightened to exactly status==202 (real 404/500 always dead); scan-wide 180s retry-sleep budget caps worst-case delay far under every timeout; challenged-only scans exit 2 (weekly workflow goes red as 'inconclusive', documented in link-check.yml); immune_check validates returncode against parsed output and emits live-check-failed on crash/parse-drift; challenged finding lists the deduped URLs (identity-stable fingerprints); sectioned stdout parser. Same hardening in gravel-race-automation and nordic-race-automation.
regression_check: tests/test_immune_waf.py (11 tests): classifier 202-vs-404+header, retry budget consumption/exhaustion, budget-fits-900s-timeout invariant, and immune parse of mixed/challenged-only/crash/drift/clean checker output
verified: post-hardening live scan 2026-07-22: 12/12 seeds + 300 discovered, all alive, exit 0; pytest tests/test_immune_waf.py 11 passed

what_broke: R4 eligibility program final wave: 216 profiles had no existence/eligibility evidence — the class that let fabricated and long-dead races (chiang-mai, belgrade, birkebeinerrittet-road, cinturon 2011) sit in the catalog as if current
root_cause: catalog seeded without an existence-verification gate
fix_applied: scripts/eligibility_audit.py (sonar-pro, ~cents/race): 216 audited in ~15 min — 168 active, 36 unknown (honest, incl. all low-confidence and composed-URL downgrades), 3 defunct, 9 cancelled; all 12 defunct/cancelled sources verified live by direct fetch and 2 official-site cancellation claims content-verified; plan-readiness regenerated. CATALOG NOW 100% AUDITED: 426/426 profiles carry evidence blocks (346 active / 22 defunct / 15 cancelled / 43 unknown)
regression_check: eligibility_audit.py is resumable — any future profile without race.eligibility is picked up by the next run; test_plan_readiness consumes the blocks; pre-existing date_specific format debt (11 profiles with prose in date fields from earlier enrichment waves) tracked separately in test_data_quality failure
verified: 2026-07-23: 12/12 risky sources 200; marmotte-pyrenees + korea-epic-ride cancellations confirmed on official sites; suite 416 passed / 1 pre-existing failure (date-format prose, predates this wave — fails with wave stashed)
